revision.comment: move protection is not full protection
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R template-protected
  |name=[[:Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects|Template-protected]]
  |from=a page that is template-protected from editing for any of several possible reasons. Only administrators and template editors may edit this page
  |info=** '''Please do not replace these redirected links''' with links directly to the target page unless expressly advised to do so below or elsewhere on this page, or if the change is supported by a policy or guideline.
}}{{#ifeq:{{{nocat|}}}|true||{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Template:R template-protected||{{#ifeq: {{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{#switch: {{PROTECTIONLEVEL:move}}
   |templateeditor=[[Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects]]
   |sysop=[[Category:Wikipedia move-protected pages]]
 }}{{#switch: {{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}}
   |templateeditor=[[Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects]]
   |sysop|autoconfirmed|extendedconfirmed|#default=[[Category:Wikipedia pages with incorrect protection templates]]
}}}}}}}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R template-protected
  |name=[[:Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects|Template-protected]]
  |from=a page that is template-protected from editing for any of several possible reasons. Only administrators and template editors may edit this page
  |info=** '''Please do not replace these redirected links''' with links directly to the target page unless expressly advised to do so below or elsewhere on this page, or if the change is supported by a policy or guideline.
}}{{#ifeq:{{{nocat|}}}|true||{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Template:R template-protected||{{#ifeq: {{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{#switch: {{PROTECTIONLEVEL:move}}
   |templateeditor=[[Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects]]
   |sysop=[[Category:Wikipedia move-protected pages]]
 }}{{#switch: {{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}}
   |templateeditor=[[Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects]]
   |sysop|autoconfirmed|extendedconfirmed|#default=[[Category:Wikipedia pages with incorrect protection templates]]
}}}}}}}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Added {{being deleted}} per [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2024 September 17#Template:R fully protected]] ([[WP:XFDC#4.0.16|XFDcloser]])
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{Being deleted|2024 September 17|Template:R fully protected|merge=Template:R protected}}</noinclude><noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R template-protected
  |name=[[:Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects|Template-protected]]
  |from=a page that is template-protected from editing for any of several possible reasons. Only administrators and template editors may edit this page
  |info=** '''Please do not replace these redirected links''' with links directly to the target page unless expressly advised to do so below or elsewhere on this page, or if the change is supported by a policy or guideline.
  |template category=<!--for automatic namespace detection-->
}}{{#ifeq:{{{nocat|}}}|true||{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Template:R template-protected||{{#ifeq: {{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{#switch: {{PROTECTIONLEVEL:move}}
   |templateeditor=[[Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects]]
   |sysop=[[Category:Wikipedia move-protected pages]]
 }}{{#switch: {{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}}
   |templateeditor=[[Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects]]
   |sysop|autoconfirmed|extendedconfirmed|#default=[[Category:Wikipedia pages with incorrect protection templates]]
}}}}}}}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

<noinclude>{{Being deleted|2024 September 17|Template:R fully protected|merge=Template:R protected}}</noinclude><noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R template-protected
  |name=[[:Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects|Template-protected]]
  |from=a page that is template-protected from editing for any of several possible reasons. Only administrators and template editors may edit this page
  |info=** '''Please do not replace these redirected links''' with links directly to the target page unless expressly advised to do so below or elsewhere on this page, or if the change is supported by a policy or guideline.
  |template category=<!--for automatic namespace detection-->
}}{{#ifeq:{{{nocat|}}}|true||{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Template:R template-protected||{{#ifeq: {{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{#switch: {{PROTECTIONLEVEL:move}}
   |templateeditor=[[Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects]]
   |sysop=[[Category:Wikipedia move-protected pages]]
 }}{{#switch: {{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}}
   |templateeditor=[[Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects]]
   |sysop|autoconfirmed|extendedconfirmed|#default=[[Category:Wikipedia pages with incorrect protection templates]]
}}}}}}}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{Being deleted|2024 September 17|Template:R fully protected|merge=Template:R protected}}</noinclude><noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R template-protected
  |name=[[:Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects|Template-protected]]
  |from=a page that is template-protected from editing for any of several possible reasons. Only administrators and template editors may edit this page
  |info=** '''Please do not replace these redirected links''' with links directly to the target page unless expressly advised to do so below or elsewhere on this page, or if the change is supported by a policy or guideline.
  |template category=<!--for automatic namespace detection-->
}}{{#ifeq:{{{nocat|}}}|true||{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Template:R template-protected||{{#ifeq: {{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{#switch: {{PROTECTIONLEVEL:move}}
   |templateeditor=[[:en:Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects|Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects]]
   |sysop=[[Category:Wikipedia move-protected pages]]
 }}{{#switch: {{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}}
   |templateeditor=[[:en:Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects|Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects]]
   |sysop|autoconfirmed|extendedconfirmed|#default=[[Category:Wikipedia pages with incorrect protection templates]]
}}}}}}}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{Being deleted|2024 September 17|Template:R fully protected|merge=Template:R protected}}</noinclude><noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R template-protected
  |name=[[:Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects|Template-protected]]
  |from=a page that is template-protected from editing for any of several possible reasons. Only administrators and template editors may edit this page
  |info=** '''Please do not replace these redirected links''' with links directly to the target page unless expressly advised to do so below or elsewhere on this page, or if the change is supported by a policy or guideline.
  |template category=<!--for automatic namespace detection-->
}}{{#ifeq:{{{nocat|}}}|true||{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Template:R template-protected||{{#ifeq: {{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{#switch: {{PROTECTIONLEVEL:move}}
   |templateeditor=[[:en:Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects|Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects]]
   |sysop=[[Category:Wikipedia move-protected pages]]
 }}{{#switch: {{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}}
   |templateeditor=[[:en:Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects|Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects]]
   |sysop|autoconfirmed|extendedconfirmed|#default=[[Category:Wikipedia pages with incorrect protection templates]]
}}}}}}}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{Being deleted|2024 September 17|Template:R fully protected|merge=Template:R protected}}</noinclude><noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R template-protected
  |name=[[:Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects|Template-protected]]
  |from=a page that is template-protected from editing for any of several possible reasons. Only administrators and template editors may edit this page
  |info=** '''Please do not replace these redirected links''' with links directly to the target page unless expressly advised to do so below or elsewhere on this page, or if the change is supported by a policy or guideline.
  |template category=<!--for automatic namespace detection-->
}}{{#ifeq:{{{nocat|}}}|true||{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Template:R template-protected||{{#ifeq: {{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{#switch: {{PROTECTIONLEVEL:move}}
   |templateeditor=[[:en:Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects|Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects]]
   |sysop=[[Category:Wikipedia move-protected pages]]
 }}{{#switch: {{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}}
   |templateeditor=[[:en:Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects|Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects]]
   |sysop|autoconfirmed|extendedconfirmed|#default=[[Category:Wikipedia pages with incorrect protection templates]]
}}}}}}}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{Being deleted|2024 September 17|Template:R fully protected|merge=Template:R protected}}</noinclude><noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R template-protected
  |name=[[:Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects|Template-protected]]
  |from=a page that is template-protected from editing for any of several possible reasons. Only administrators and template editors may edit this page
  |info=** '''Please do not replace these redirected links''' with links directly to the target page unless expressly advised to do so below or elsewhere on this page, or if the change is supported by a policy or guideline.
  |template category=<!--for automatic namespace detection-->
}}{{#ifeq:{{{nocat|}}}|true||{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Template:R template-protected||{{#ifeq: {{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{#switch: {{PROTECTIONLEVEL:move}}
   |templateeditor=[[:en:Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects|Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects]]
   |sysop=[[Category:Wikipedia move-protected pages]]
 }}{{#switch: {{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}}
   |templateeditor=[[:en:Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects|Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects]]
   |sysop|autoconfirmed|extendedconfirmed|#default=[[Category:Wikipedia pages with incorrect protection templates]]
}}}}}}}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{Being deleted|2024 September 17|Template:R fully protected|merge=Template:R protected}}</noinclude><noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R template-protected |name=[[:Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects|Template-protected]] |from=a page that is template-protected from editing for any of several possible reasons. Only administrators and template editors may edit this page |info=** '''Please do not replace these redirected links''' with links directly to the target page unless expressly advised to do so below or elsewhere on this page, or if the change is supported by a policy or guideline. |template category=<!--for automatic namespace detection--> }}{{#ifeq:{{{nocat|}}}|true||{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Template:R template-protected||{{#ifeq: {{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{#switch: {{PROTECTIONLEVEL:move}} |templateeditor=[[:en:Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects|Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects]] |sysop= }}{{#switch: {{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}} |templateeditor=[[:en:Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects|Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects]] |sysop|autoconfirmed|extendedconfirmed|#default=}}}}}}}}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Wikipedia move-protected pages]] [[Category:Wikipedia pages with incorrect protection templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

<noinclude>{{Being deleted|2024 September 17|Template:R fully protected|merge=Template:R protected}}</noinclude><noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R template-protected |name=[[:Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects|Template-protected]] |from=a page that is template-protected from editing for any of several possible reasons. Only administrators and template editors may edit this page |info=** '''Please do not replace these redirected links''' with links directly to the target page unless expressly advised to do so below or elsewhere on this page, or if the change is supported by a policy or guideline. |template category=<!--for automatic namespace detection--> }}{{#ifeq:{{{nocat|}}}|true||{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Template:R template-protected||{{#ifeq: {{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{#switch: {{PROTECTIONLEVEL:move}} |templateeditor=[[:en:Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects|Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects]] |sysop= }}{{#switch: {{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}} |templateeditor=[[:en:Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects|Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects]] |sysop|autoconfirmed|extendedconfirmed|#default=}}}}}}}}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{documentation}}
[[Category:Wikipedia move-protected pages]] [[Category:Wikipedia pages with incorrect protection templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24964547982|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{Being deleted|2024 September 17|Template:R fully protected|merge=Template:R protected}}</noinclude><noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R template-protected |name=[[:Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects|Template-protected]] |from=a page that is template-protected from editing for any of several possible reasons. Only administrators and template editors may edit this page |info=** '''Please do not replace these redirected links''' with links directly to the target page unless expressly advised to do so below or elsewhere on this page, or if the change is supported by a policy or guideline. |template category= }}{{#ifeq:{{{nocat|}}}|true||{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Template:R template-protected||{{#ifeq: {{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{#switch: {{PROTECTIONLEVEL:move}} |templateeditor=[[:en:Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects|Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects]] |sysop= }}{{#switch: {{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}} |templateeditor=[[:en:Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects|Category:Wikipedia template-protected redirects]] |sysop|autoconfirmed|extendedconfirmed|#default=}}}}}}}}<noinclude>
{{documentation}}
[[Category:Wikipedia move-protected pages]] [[Category:Wikipedia pages with incorrect protection templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
